narrative:
Precinct Cambridge B (precinct in Guernsey County) has 762 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
